summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Aamir Mir Consulting website MVP. Backend APIs 100% functional, frontend 95% functional with excellent user experience. All core features working including forms, theme toggle, blog, and admin login.

design_issues.issue: About, Services, Case Studies navigation links not found with standard selectors - may use custom smooth scrolling implementation

passed_tests: All 23 backend API endpoints (100% success rate)
Homepage loads with all sections (Hero, About, Services, Systems, Case Studies, CTA, FAQ)
Book Strategy Call form (POST /api/leads) with all fields and dropdown
Blog page loads with categories and filtering
Admin login page with Google OAuth integration
